# daytona_volume (Data Source)

Reads a Daytona persistent volume by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_volume" "example" {
  id = "volume-id"
}

output "daytona_volume_state" {
  value = data.daytona_volume.example.state
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Daytona volume ID.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Volume creation timestamp.
- `error_reason` (String) Volume error reason, when available.
- `last_used_at` (String) Volume last-used timestamp, when available.
- `name` (String) Volume name.
- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID that owns the volume.
- `state` (String) Current volume state.
- `updated_at` (String) Volume update timestamp.
